text: Lambda In-depth PARTT @ it @ st ¢ Function-as-a-Service (FaaS) - short running & focussed e Lambda function - a piece of code lambda runs ¢ Functions use a runtime (e.g. Python 3.8) ¢ Functions are loaded and run in a runtime environment * The environment has a direct memory (indirect CPU) allocation ¢ You are billed for the duration that a function runs ¢ A key part of Serverless architectures
